refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital room, next to a bag of luggage. The rodent appears to be near patient belongings.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, it was right next to my luggage. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about my health and safety. The hospital needs to take immediate action to address this pest control issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, it's right next to my stuff. This is disgusting and I'm really concerned about getting sick.
